title: General Manager
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

W NETWORK PRIVATE LIMITED is a regional company that is active in the distribution and retail of smart mobile devices and lifestyle electronics in Asia, with extensive operations in Singapore. It’s W mission to enable and enhance connection for people in Singapore and across Southeast Asia. We aim to be the brightest provider of connection devices and services, and to serve with a caring touch. We believe that achieving the best outcomes for our stakeholders – including customers, partners and shareholders – involves taking a principled approach to business.

Job Summary

Support brand strategy development and execution to drive market presence and sales growth. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance brand awareness, maintain brand consistency, and optimize brand promotion activities across digital and traditional channels.

General Manager / Head of Brand & GMV (Singapore)

We are hiring a senior, hands-on commercial leader to build and scale a well-known China IPO consumer brand in Singapore, owning brand, omnichannel sales, GMV planning, margin control, and end-to-end operations.

This is a full ownership role, accountable for 2026 GMV targets, from strategy to execution — online and offline.

What You Will Own

Brand & Market

  • Own brand positioning and localisation for Singapore / SEA

  • Ensure brand consistency across all customer touchpoints

Omnichannel GMV

  • Online: TikTok Shop, Lazada, Shopee, Amazon, brand website (DTC)

  • Offline: KA channels, exhibitions, pop-ups, brand stores, group-buy

  • Build and execute annual GMV plan by channel

Commercial & Margin

  • Own pricing, promotions, and channel margin

  • Balance growth, profitability, and long-term brand value

End-to-End Operations

  • Oversee fulfilment, warehouse, logistics

  • Own customer service, returns, repair & aftersales

  • Ensure operations scale with GMV — without margin leakage

Leadership

  • Act as single owner across sales, marketing, ops, and partners

  • Build a lean, execution-driven team

  • Report directly to CEO / HQ with clear GMV & P&L metrics

What We’re Looking For

  • 8–12+ years in consumer brand / omnichannel / GMV-driven roles

  • Proven ownership of GMV targets and margins

  • Strong understanding of SEA e-commerce ecosystems

  • Experience working with China brands / China HQ (IPO brand a plus)

  • Comfortable being hands-on, fast-moving, and accountable

This Role Is NOT For You If

  • You only manage one function (marketing / ops / sales only)

  • You avoid owning numbers and results

  • You prefer stability over building from scratch

This role owns the GMV. No excuses — but no ceiling.
